zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Stanley於大約1559年出生時，她的父親Thomas Stanley30歲，母親Joyce Barrett40歲。她於大約1570年與Sir Edward Herbert在英國賀特福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1597年享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Stanley于大约1559年出生时，她的父亲Thomas Stanley30岁，母亲Joyce Barrett40岁。她于大约1570年与Sir Edward Herbert在英国賀特福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1597年享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Stanley was born about 1559, her father, Thomas Stanley, was 30 and her mother, Joyce Barrett, was 40. She married Sir Edward Herbert about 1570, in Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. She died about 1597, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Stanley est née environ 1559, son père, Thomas Stanley, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joyce Barrett, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edward Herbert environ 1570, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1597, à l’âge de 40 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Stanleyが約1559年に生まれた時，父Thomas Stanleyは30歳，母Joyce Barrettは40歳であった。約1570年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアでSir Edward Herbertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1597年に40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Stanley(이)가 대략 1559년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Stanley(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joyce Barrett(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1570년 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 Sir Edward Herbert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1597년 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Stanley родилась около 1559 г., её отцу по имени Thomas Stanley было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joyce Barrett, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edward Herbert около 1570 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла около 1597 г. в возрасте 40 лет.
